category.name: zoo.eventItems
category.item: Spooky carved pumpkins, called Jack-o-lanterns, glow in the darkness of Halloween night. His hideous grimace is made even more terrifying by the flickering candlelight. Uuu
A slender fir tree has grown...! A festively decorated tree, complete with Christmas gifts.
Bring on the good luck! People in many countries believe that kissing a chimney sweep on Valentine's Day will bring them great luck!
Yum! What would a birthday be without a caloric treat?
Yum! What would a birthday be without this caloric treat?
A nice collection of Easter eggs. In the past, painted chicken eggs were used. Nowadays, chocolate eggs are more common.
Easter eggs specially adapted for visually impaired children to participate in the Easter hunt. The eggs beep or play a melody.
